configuration.springProfile:
when the profile is not local, below appender will be applied
encoders are assigned the type ch.qos.logback.classic.encoder.PatternLayoutEncoder by default
%d{HH:mm:ss.SSS} [%thread] %-5level %logger{35} - %msg %n
http://localhost:9200/_bulk first-ms-%date{yyyy-MM-dd} tester es-logger optional es-error-logger optional 30000 optional (in ms, default 30000) false optional (default false) false optional (default false) false optional (default false) 104857600 optional (default 104857600) 3 optional (default 3) 30000 optional (in ms, default 30000) 250 optional (in ms, default 250) false optional (default false) false optional (default false) 100 optional (default -1 optional
host ${HOSTNAME} false
severity %level
thread %thread
stacktrace %ex
logger %logger
Content-Type application/json
We don't want to see a never ending cascade of connection failed ERRORS
%msg This pattern is important, otherwise it won't be the raw Elasticsearch format anymore
